biological_replicate: P. gingivalis W83 was used as the parent strain for the study
experimental_design: RbpPg1 plays no role in growth of P. gingivalis with nitrosative stress
factor_value: RbpPg1-deficient strain V3139 compared to the parental W83 strain
number_of_biological_replicates: four biological replicates prepared on separate days
number_of_samples: four biological replicates prepared on separate days and samples were fractionated (12 fractions)
